signals.headline: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in Eastern Conference first round after 115-105 Game 2 win** | NO | HIGH con
signals.raw:
Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in Eastern Conference first round after 115-105 Game 2 win** | NO | HIGH confidence

Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28, and Evan Mobley posted 25 points with 8 rebounds to secure the victory on Monday, April 20, extending Cleveland's playoff win streak against Toronto to 12 straight games[1][4]. This first-round result, with Game 3
